content.problemStatement:
You are given NNN integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.

You can perform the following operation any number of times:


Select any index iii such that 1‚Č§i‚Č§(N‚ąí1)1 \le i \le (N-1)1‚Č§i‚Č§(N‚ąí1);
Subtract 111 from AiA_iAi‚Äč and 222 from Ai+1A_{i+1}Ai+1‚Äč.
Find the **smallest** possible value of ‚ą£A1‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚ą£+‚Ä¶+‚ą£AN‚ą£|A_1| + |A_2| + \ldots + |A_N|‚ą£A1‚Äč‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚Äč‚ą£+‚Ä¶+‚ą£AN‚Äč‚ą£ you can achieve after performing any number of given operations.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN ‚ÄĒ the number of integers.
The second line of each test case contains NNN integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.




Output Format
For each test case, output a single integer ‚ÄĒ the **smallest** possible value of ‚ą£A1‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚ą£+‚Ä¶+‚ą£AN‚ą£|A_1| + |A_2| + \ldots + |A_N|‚ą£A1‚Äč‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚Äč‚ą£+‚Ä¶+‚ą£AN‚Äč‚ą£ you can achieve after performing any number of given operations.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2‚čÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚čÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: We can apply the operation for i=1i = 1i=1. Thus, the array becomes A=[1,2]A = [1, 2]A=[1,2]. On applying the operation again for i=1i=1i=1, the array becomes A=[0,0]A = [0, 0]A=[0,0]. Thus, the value of ‚ą£A1‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚ą£=0|A_1| + |A_2| = 0‚ą£A1‚Äč‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚Äč‚ą£=0. It can be shown that this is the smallest possible value of ‚ą£A1‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚ą£|A_1| + |A_2|‚ą£A1‚Äč‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚Äč‚ą£.
Test case 222: Apply the operation for i=1i = 1i=1. The array becomes A=[0,‚ąí1,1]A = [0, -1, 1]A=[0,‚ąí1,1]. Thus, the value ‚ą£A1+‚ą£A2‚ą£+‚ą£A3‚ą£=0+1+1=2|A_1+|A_2|+|A_3| = 0+1+1 = 2‚ą£A1‚Äč+‚ą£A2‚Äč‚ą£+‚ą£A3‚Äč‚ą£=0+1+1=2.
Test case 333: We apply three operations on indices 1,3,1, 3,1,3, and 555 respectively. Thus, the final array becomes A=[‚ąí5,0,‚ąí5,0,‚ąí5,0]A = [-5, 0, -5, 0, -5, 0]A=[‚ąí5,0,‚ąí5,0,‚ąí5,0]. The value ‚ą£A1‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚ą£+‚Ä¶+‚ą£A6‚ą£=15|A_1| + |A_2| + \ldots + |A_6| = 15‚ą£A1‚Äč‚ą£+‚ą£A2‚Äč‚ą£+‚Ä¶+‚ą£A6‚Äč‚ą£=15.
Test case 444: We cannot apply any operation on the array as we cannot choose any valid index.
